query:
SELECT 
  authorName,
  s3AvatarUrl,
  avatarUrl,
  LEFT(lastAvatarPrompt, 100) as promptPreview,
  avatarGenVendor,
  avatarGenModel,
  updatedAt
FROM author_profiles 
WHERE authorName IN ('Adam Grant', 'Brené Brown', 'Malcolm Gladwell')
ORDER BY authorName;
